endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Network.Admin/locations
endpoints.description: Returns the list of supported locations
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Network.Admin/locations/{location}/operationResults
endpoints.description: Returns the list of operation results for a location
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Network.Admin/locations/{location}/operations
endpoints.description: Returns the list of support REST operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Network.Admin/operations
endpoints.description: Returns the list of support REST operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Network.Admin/adminOverview
endpoints.description: Get an overview of the state of the network resource provider.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.
